negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_061
prompt: The video opens with a close-up of a rectangular aluminum foil pan filled with a textured mixture, likely a stuffing or rice-based casserole, speckled with herbs and vegetables. The pan is placed on a white surface, possibly a table or countertop, set against a neutral-toned floor, suggesting an indoor setting like a kitchen or dining area. A person wearing a dark-colored jacket with visible buttons and a silver watch on their left wrist is seen interacting with the food. Their hand, adorned with a bracelet featuring green and blue beads, reaches into the pan, suggesting they are either tasting or adjusting the contents. The person then uses a spoon to gently stir and mix the contents, moving the spoon across the surface to ensure even distribution. The focus remains on the hands and the pan throughout the sequence, emphasizing the tactile nature of the food preparation process.
